title: Paying the Bills
content: On the first weekend of every month, Marcus sits at the kitchen table to pay his bills. He opens his laptop, checks his bank account, and carefully organizes each payment. Electricity, internet, rent, and phone bills always arrive at the same time. Although Marcus does not enjoy this task, he likes feeling organized afterward. Sometimes he drinks coffee while listening to relaxing music during the process. When everything is finished, he closes the laptop with relief and enjoys the rest of his evening without worrying about finances.
